facebook.caption: Looking for a chill spot to start your morning in Phu Quoc? Zyzu Kafé on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo in Duong Dong has built a quiet reputation among visitors, sitting at a solid 4.4 out of 5 across over 300 reviews. It's the kind of place that earns repeat visits, a local-feeling café that doesn't try too hard but consistently delivers. Stop in, slow down, and let the island pace find you.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the cups come out and the morning crowd settle in at Zyzu Kafé. This corner of Duong Dong has a relaxed rhythm that's hard to find once the day gets busy. If your Phu Quoc itinerary needs a proper coffee stop, this one earns its 4.4 stars.

instagram.caption: Morning sorted. Zyzu Kafé in Duong Dong is one of those low-key finds that keeps pulling people back, 4.4 stars and 333 reviews says it all. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo never looked so inviting.
instagram.video_caption: Coffee, good vibes, and no rush. Zyzu Kafé is exactly the kind of morning stop Phu Quoc does best. Find it on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo in Duong Dong.

tiktok.caption: Your Phu Quoc morning needs this café. Zyzu Kafé on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is low-key, loved, and very worth it. #PhuQuoc #ZyzuKafe #VietnamCafe #CafeHopping
